responseMessageContents.text:
The deployment failed — the Cloudflare API token is invalid or expired. The error is:

> **Unable to authenticate request [code: 10001]**

This means the token `cfat_yIziPzQX1vIdK2PFX2xqERgRunPLDc1X1F9hpBCge783fac2` cannot authenticate with Cloudflare.

Please generate a new API token from your [Cloudflare dashboard](https://dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens) with **Workers** edit permissions, and share it so I can retry the deployment.
